ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barry Schneider for Paul Moss (Petitioner/Administrator). Evyn Shomer specially appeared for Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Adminsitrator. Paul Malone for Andres Reno (Heir).

Mr. Schneider explained that the $3,500.00 had been paid but that it needed to be subtracted from the carrying balance. In addition, Mr. Schneider stated that the Public Administrator's fee request should be charactorized as extra ordinary hours and explained the extent of services provided to support his fee request. Mr. Schneider aslo provided a copy of verification that the letters were valid. Both matters were taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.

Off Calendar May-28-2008 Continued To Jun-10-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-16-2007 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Barry Schneider appearing for and with Paul Moss. Jonathan Ferdon appeared for the SFPA (Special Administrator). Paul Malone appearing for Andre Reno.

Mr. Schneider reported that the DNA testing did not take place due to the settlement being reached. He asked the Court to approve the settlement agreement which includes the attorney's fees. Mr. Malone agreed that the attorney's fees were part of the settlement agreement. The Court appointed Paul Moss as the administrator of the estate. The bond is fixed in the amount of $600,000.00. The administrator is authorized to sell the property with confirmation of the Court. Mr. Ferdon informed the court that he would petition for termination of the Special Administration and request fees. The Court approved the settlement agreement and signed two orders in open court.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth CSR#5162. Bailiff: O. Arias. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Off Calendar Sep-04-2007 Continued To Oct-02-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: JOHNATHAN FERDON, APPEARING FOR PUBLIC ADMINISTRATOR; BARRY SCHNEIDER, APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;PAUL MALONE, AOOEARING FOR THE OBJECTOR

MR. SCHNEIDER STATES THAT THE DNA TESTING WILL BE CONCLUSIVE BY TESTING THE SIBLINGS OF THE DESEASED. MR. MALONE STATES THAT IN THE DIVORCE PAPERS THERE WAS NO MENTION OF ANY CHILD AND THAT THE IS NOT GURANTEE THAT THE DNA TESTING WILL BE CONCLUSIVE. MATTERS CONTINUED TO 9/26/07 ON STATUS OF THE DNA TESTING.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Continued To Aug-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Barry Schneider appearing for and with Paul Moss. Paul Malone appearing for objector Ondray Reno. Jonathan Ferdon appearing for Public Administrator. Court has not seen the documents that Mr. Malone filed yesterday. Ondray Reno is claiming to be a son. Mr. Schneider wanted to have a DNA test. There is no cash only two pieces of property. One of them is in default. The petitoner is prepared to take steps to obtain a loan to cure the default. He wanted to be appointed as the special administrator to do that. Mr. Malone objected to the appointment. He wanted to nominate Daniel Conrad as the special administrator. Court stated that the Public Administrator has priority. Court is appointing the Public Administator as the special administrator with authority to sell subject to court confirmation. Counsel will be notified if it is necessary to sell. Special Letters will expire until further order of the court. Mr. Ferdon will prepare the order. Matter is continued to 8/21 for status.
Presiding: Judge John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: De Leon.
